items.name: MARCHÉE - Black Spine Distressed Denim Blazer
items.description:
MARCHÉE - Washed Black Spine Distressed Denim Blazer
──────────────────────────────────────────
An avant-garde digital fashion label built on Roblox. Born at the intersection of virtual elegance and modern rebellion, MARCHÉE redefines what fashion means in a world where pixels are the new fabric.

**DISCLAIMER: Due to the wide variety of avatar bodies, complex poses, and the baggy silhouettes of our designs, slight visual glitches or artifacts may occur. Please try before purchase.

items.name: Starlight Blade : Korblox
items.description: Starlight Blade: Korblox is a formidable and mystical weapon forged from the essence of starlight and the dark, ancient power of the Korblox. This blade is designed for those who seek to harness the cosmic brilliance of the stars and the arcane might of the Korblox, making it a weapon of unparalleled power and mystery.
